description: Eval queries for skill disambiguation. Each query should trigger exactly one skill. Run each query 3x and measure false positive/negative rates.

queries.query: Generate a Polarion test case for ACM-32282
queries.notes: Canonical trigger: bare JIRA ID + test case intent

queries.query: Write a test case for ACM-30459 targeting version 2.17
queries.notes: Near-miss: 'write a test case' could pull writer, but JIRA ID means generator

queries.query: I need test coverage for the governance policy status column story ACM-31500
queries.notes: Indirect phrasing with JIRA ID

queries.query: Create a Polarion test case from this JIRA ticket: ACM-30100
queries.notes: Explicit Polarion + JIRA intent

queries.query: Process ACM-32000 for testing
queries.notes: Vague phrasing but JIRA ID present

queries.query: Generate test cases for ACM-30459 and ACM-30460
queries.notes: Multi-ticket batch intent

queries.query: What should we test in console PR 5432?
queries.notes: PR analysis without Polarion/JIRA pipeline intent

queries.query: Analyze PR #5790 in stolostron/console
queries.notes: Canonical PR analysis trigger

queries.query: What changed in this merge? PR 6100 in kubevirt-plugin
queries.notes: Diff analysis intent without test case generation

queries.query: Show me the test impact of PR #5500
queries.notes: Test impact analysis, not full pipeline

queries.query: What UI elements changed in PR 5790?
queries.notes: PR-specific UI change question

queries.query: Review RHACM4K-61726.md before I paste into Polarion
queries.notes: Standalone review of existing file

queries.query: Check this test case for quality issues: runs/ACM-30459/test-case.md
queries.notes: Quality review with file path

queries.query: Validate the test steps in my test case draft
queries.notes: Review intent on out-of-band draft

queries.query: Is this test case ready for Polarion? [attached markdown]
queries.notes: Pre-Polarion QA check

queries.query: What is the description list field order for RBAC roles?
queries.notes: Domain fact lookup, no pipeline needed

queries.query: What are the test case conventions for governance area?
queries.notes: Convention lookup

queries.query: Show me the title tag pattern for Fleet Virtualization
queries.notes: Specific area naming pattern

queries.query: What CRDs does the clusters area use?
queries.notes: Architecture knowledge lookup

queries.query: Turn this synthesis into test-case markdown: [pasted full synthesis context with ACs, code analysis, UI findings]
queries.notes: Explicit write from existing synthesis — rare but valid

queries.query: Write a test case from this context: JIRA ACM-30459 ACs: [list], PR diff: [summary], UI elements: [list]
queries.notes: Manual context provided, standalone write

queries.query: Write a test case for ACM-30459
queries.notes: CRITICAL near-miss: 'write a test case' + JIRA ID = generator, NOT writer. Writer has disable-model-invocation so should not trigger.

queries.query: Review the test case we just generated
queries.notes: Post-generation review is Phase 7 inside generator. Should NOT trigger standalone reviewer.

queries.query: Analyze this PR and write a test case: PR #5790 for ACM-30459
queries.notes: Combined PR + JIRA = full pipeline. Should NOT trigger code-analyzer alone.

queries.query: What are the ACM conventions for writing test cases?
queries.notes: Convention question, NOT a test case generation request. Should NOT trigger generator.

queries.query: Help me understand what this PR changed so I can write a test
queries.notes: 'write a test' is intent context, not a generation request. Should be code-analyzer for the PR analysis.

queries.query: Check if my test case covers all the ACs from ACM-30459
queries.notes: AC coverage check on existing test case = review, not generation

queries.query: What does the governance architecture look like?
queries.notes: Architecture question should NOT trigger generator even though governance is an ACM area

queries.query: Generate a test case
queries.notes: Bare trigger without JIRA ID — generator should ask for the ticket

queries.query: Run the quality reviewer on test-case.md
queries.notes: Explicit reviewer invocation

queries.query: What filtering behavior does the search area have?
queries.notes: Area-specific domain knowledge lookup

queries.query: Analyze the diff for PR 5790 and tell me what UI components were added
queries.notes: PR diff analysis with specific UI focus

queries.query: I need a Polarion test case for the new cluster import wizard
queries.notes: Feature description without JIRA ID — generator should ask for the ticket

queries.query: Does the test case follow our conventions?
queries.notes: Convention compliance check = review, not knowledge-base lookup

queries.query: What's the Polarion component mapping for MTV?
queries.notes: Polarion metadata fact lookup
